plays.summary: It's 17°F at first pitch — cold air kills the ball and generally helps pitchers maintain grip and command. Suppressed run environment. Noah Davis (4.60 xFIP) is the weaker arm, and 13mph wind blowing In from CF tilts under. No line yet — model is at 7.3 runs. Watch for a under when odds open.

Chris Sale is at 3.33 xFIP — above average — going up against a near league average TBR lineup (98 wRC+). Tough spot for TBR's bats. 36°F further suppresses scoring, and TBR's pen is taxed (17 innings last 2 days). No line yet — model is at 7.7 runs. Watch for a under when odds open.
